accepted_candidates.label: AI Meeting Prep Copilot
accepted_candidates.description: Helps operators prepare for recurring customer, investor, and hiring meetings.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: pre-meeting research, agenda shaping, and brief generation
accepted_candidates.mastery_surface: turning recurring meeting preparation into a compounding operator advantage
accepted_candidates.user_value_loop: collect context, draft brief, improve after each meeting
accepted_candidates.evidence_summary: Repeated operator pain around recurring prep work and fragmented context.
accepted_candidates.raw_observation: Operators want a repeated prep workflow, not just generic note-taking.
classification_reasons: Has domain shape, specialization surface, mastery surface, and evidence summary.

merged_candidates.label: AI Meeting Prep Assistant
merged_candidates.description: An assistant for recurring high-stakes meeting preparation.
merged_candidates.mastery_surface: improving high-stakes prep quality over repeated cycles
merged_candidates.user_value_loop: collect context, generate brief, review outcomes, refine next time
merged_candidates.evidence_summary: Same recurring operator need observed from a second angle.
merged_candidates.raw_observation: Alias candidate for the same repeated meeting prep domain.
classification_reasons: Duplicate of another candidate in the same batch.

merged_candidates.label: MCP Server Builder
merged_candidates.description: Tools that help developers build MCP servers faster.
merged_candidates.user_value_loop: define interface, scaffold server, test integration, iterate
merged_candidates.evidence_summary: Already represented in the maintained benchmark universe.
classification_reasons: Already exists in the current benchmark or known universe.

rejected_candidates.label: Prompt Library For Teams
rejected_candidates.description: A shared place to store prompts used by a team.
rejected_candidates.evidence_summary: Useful workflow, but still mostly a feature bucket.
rejected_candidates.raw_observation: This sounds more like a workflow or feature set than a durable domain.
classification_reasons: Does not specify a specialization or mastery surface.

rejected_candidates.label: Displaced Workers
rejected_candidates.description: People hit by AI-driven job loss.
rejected_candidates.evidence_summary: Real audience, but not a domain by itself.
rejected_candidates.raw_observation: Persona group under macro pressure, not yet a repeated workflow domain.
classification_reasons: Describes a persona or audience but not a repeated operating domain.

rejected_candidates.label: Vibe Stuff
classification_reasons: Missing enough naming or description detail to define a domain.

next_actions: Feed the clear_domain_chip set into a smaller MiroFish evaluation run.
Review rejected candidates to ensure duplicates and vague ideas were not misclassified.
